request_authority.source: tenant_id and principal_id from the independently validated AuthorizationGrant on every HTTP request
request_authority.binding: AgentSessionOwner is reconstructed before every create, observe, act, replay export or close operation
request_authority.transport_session: MCP-Session-Id is transport state only and never grants or fixes battle authority
request_authority.cross_authority: session_not_owned before session result, state or idempotency disclosure

rate_limits.clock: injected monotonic operational clock; regression fails closed

exhaustion.body: generic; contains no tenant, principal, session, token or state data

idempotency.retry: same authority and canonical request returns the exact committed response
idempotency.cross_authority: ownership rejection occurs before idempotency lookup
